title: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (MTD) CEO Patrick Kaltenbach on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. (NYSE:MTD ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 29, 2022 7:00 AM ET Company Participants Adam Uhlman - Investor Relations Patrick Kaltenbach - Chief Executive Officer Shawn Vadala - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Vijay Kumar - Evercore ISI Catherine Schulte - Baird Matt Sykes - Goldman Sachs Patrick Donnelly - Citi Dan Arias - Stifel Derik De Bruin - Bank of America Josh Waldman - Cleveland Research Rachel Vatnsdal - JPMorgan Operator Good day, and welcome to the Second Quarter 2022 Mettler-Toledo International Inc. Earnings Call. Today's conference is being recorded.

title: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 7.56% and 3.42%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in the Offing for Mettler-Toledo's (MTD) Q2 Earnings?
text: Mettler-Toledo's (MTD) Q2 results are likely to reflect the benefits of a robust product portfolio and comprehensive services. However, supply-chain constraints might have been a concern.

title: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. to Host Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio, July 07, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE:MTD) today announced it will host a conference call to discuss the Company's quarterly results on Friday, July 29, 2022 at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Time. To hear a live webcast of the call, visit www.mt.com/investors on the Company's website. A replay of the webcast will be available until August 5, 2022.
